metadata.description: All unique AXISBK SMS formats found in all_sms.json
metadata.note: Use this to test parser patterns. Each format should match its expected_pattern.

upi_debit.description: Standard UPI debit - most common format

examples.sms:
INR 50.00 debited
A/c no. XX0316
19-03-26, 17:23:11
UPI/P2M/873443770786/NEXUS SHANTINIKETAN
Not you? SMS BLOCKUPI Cust ID to 919951860002
Axis Bank

INR 6792.00 debited
A/c no. XX0316
19-03-26, 18:26:26
UPI/P2M/607856238242/Blinkit
Not you? SMS BLOCKUPI Cust ID to 919951860002
Axis Bank

Debit INR 9952.92
Axis Bank A/c XX0316
23-03-26 17:17:00
OUTWARD REM NO. 0741RI2608
WhatsApp BAL to 917036165000
Not You? SMS BLOCKALL CustID to 919951860002

Debit INR 19904.58
Axis Bank A/c XX0316
20-04-26 10:05:31
OUTWARD REM NO. 0741RI2611
WhatsApp BAL to 917036165000
Not You? SMS BLOCKALL CustID to 919951860002

credit_with_on.description: Credit transaction with 'on' keyword before date

examples.sms: INR 174445.00 credited to A/c no. XX0316 on 30-03-26 at 12:24:19 IST. Info - ACH-CR-SAL-ENPHASESOLARENE. Chk Bal https://ccm.axis.bank.in/AXISBK/ltt3Dvko - Axis Bank
INR 154291.00 credited to A/c no. XX0316 on 30-04-26 at 16:28:08 IST. Info - ACH-CR-SAL-ENPHASESOLARENE. Chk Bal https://ccm.axis.bank.in/AXISBK/ltt3Dvko - Axis Bank

credit_without_on.description: Credit transaction WITHOUT 'on' keyword - PROBLEM FORMAT!
credit_without_on.note: ⚠️ This is the June 2 missing transaction - current parser doesn't handle this

examples.sms:
INR 57416.76 credited to A/c no. XX0316 at 02-06-26 11:47:06 IST
Ref: IMPS/P2A/615311446249/GROWWINV
For any details, call 18001035577 - Axis Bank
examples.issue: No 'on' keyword, no comma between date and time, newline before Ref

ach_debit.description: ACH debit - automated clearing house debit

examples.sms:
Debit INR 4500.00
Axis Bank A/c XX0316
01-04-26 08:16:03
ACH-DR-Groww Pay Services 
WhatsApp BAL to 917036165000
Not You? SMS BLOCKALL CustID to 919951860002

Debit INR 3600.00
Axis Bank A/c XX0316
01-04-26 08:16:05
ACH-DR-Groww Pay Services 
WhatsApp BAL to 917036165000
Not You? SMS BLOCKALL CustID to 919951860002

nach_debit.description: NACH debit - mostly SIPs (Systematic Investment Plans)

examples.sms: NACH debit towards Groww Pay Services P for INR 2,700.00 with UMRN UTIB7022402220010690 has been successfully processed in A/c no. XX0316 today - Axis Bank

google_play.description: Google Play AutoPay - auto debit notifications and processed messages

examples.sms: INR 130.00 for Google Play will be auto debited via Axis Bank Credit Card no. XX5380 by 10-04-26. Please maintain sufficient limit on the card to process the auto debit. To deactivate AutoPay facility for ID XMzyoTfIQu, click https://ccm.axis.bank.in/AXISBK/NKIx9UvH. TnC apply.

INR 1999.00 for Google Play will be auto debited via Axis Bank Credit Card no. XX5380 by 10-04-26. Please maintain sufficient limit on the card to process the auto debit. To deactivate AutoPay facility for ID YKtrYj9LXK, click https://ccm.axis.bank.in/AXISBK/NONr2TAE. TnC apply.

other.description: OTPs, feedback surveys, etc. - NOT FINANCIAL TRANSACTIONS
other.note: These should be IGNORED by parser

examples.sms: 191593 is the OTP for authentication on the Axis Bank Outward Remittance platform. Valid for 5 mins. Please do not share it with anyone.
examples.note: Not a financial transaction - correctly returns None

examples.sms: Axis Bank is open to hear your feedback on your recent remittance transaction. Click https://ccm.axis.bank.in/AXISBK/ndb49rvQ to start the short survey.
examples.note: Not a financial transaction - correctly returns None
